source_domains: Database bootstrap, connection, server capability, and unavailable database boundaries
Query execution, result retrieval, public result state, and query logging
Charset, collation, safe-collation checks, and invalid text stripping
Table lists, prefixes, blog switching, and multisite table state

cases.focus: existing table short-circuit and missing table creation through a live SHOW TABLES and CREATE TABLE path
live DESC column discovery and ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN execution
live DESCRIBE/SHOW INDEX metadata consumed for a non-executed dbDelta schema plan
live ALTER/INSERT/UPDATE execution and resulting schema/data state
schema SQL generation with live wpdb charset/collation state
global table dbDelta filtering before live metadata/execution
real option.php cache/storage flow over a live wp_options table
batch option priming and autoload updates against live rows
non-expiring transient storage through the live options table
live multi-table expired transient cleanup SQL
server identity, SQL mode normalization, charset/collation, and information-schema metadata
limited-user permission denial and wpdb last_error behavior
transaction rollback and explicit table lock/unlock behavior

live_boundaries_covered: server charset/collation negotiation and SQL mode setup
real DDL/DML execution for maybe_create_table, maybe_add_column, and dbDelta
DESCRIBE and SHOW INDEX metadata consumed by dbDelta
database-backed option and transient storage in wp_options
limited-user permission denial captured through wpdb::last_error
transaction rollback and LOCK TABLES/UNLOCK TABLES behavior

native_boundaries.reason: upgrade.php requires wp-admin/includes/admin.php at load time, but the live gate exercises dbDelta(), maybe_create_table(), maybe_add_column(), wp_should_upgrade_global_tables(), option.php, and transient storage only.

The fixture provisions disposable local Docker databases with root bootstrap credentials, then creates a limited user for permission-denial coverage. Production credential provisioning and secret handling are outside this parity gate.

closes_gaps_from.resolution: WPHX-305.07 runs the WPHX-305.06 schema/option/transient seed cases against locked live MySQL and MariaDB containers and records remaining non-database boundaries separately.
WPHX-305.09 adds pinned PHP 8.4/8.5 DB-client images with mysqli and pdo_mysql, and this live gate now runs oracle and candidate probes through that client matrix.

run_summaries.command: docker run --rm --network <network> -v <repo>:/work -w /work wordpresshx/php-db-client:8.4-cli-mysqli-pdo-mysql php build/wp-core/wphx-305-07/probe.php oracle build/wp-core/wphx-305-07/oracle db 3306 root <password> wordpresshx_live mysql-8.4:php-8.4-db-client

remaining_gaps.detail: The candidate side is a copied WordPress oracle source tree until selected wpdb/schema/option helpers move behind typed Haxe parity candidates.
upgrade.php is loaded with a stubbed admin include because this harness covers database helpers and storage paths, not the broader install/admin API.
This fixture covers WPHX-305.06 seed traces plus live runtime checks. Full upstream wpdb, dbDelta, option, and transient PHPUnit parity remains a domain-level closure requirement.
